message:
Running command: WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

echo "=== Error in log ==="
grep "ERROR\|GRT-0183" /tmp/librelane_final.log | tail -10

echo ""
echo "=== Check step 35 and 38 state files ==="
ls -la "$WRAPPER_RUN/35-openroad-globalrouting/state_out.json" 2>/dev/null && echo "step35 state_out: EXISTS" || echo "step35 state_out: MISSING"
ls -la "$WRAPPER_RUN/38-openroad-repairantennas/state_out.json" 2>/dev/null && echo "step38 state_out: EXISTS" || echo "step38 state_out: MISSING"
ls -la "$WRAPPER_RUN/37-odb-diodesonports/state_out.json" 2>/dev/null && echo "step37 state_out: EXISTS" || echo "step37 state_out: MISSING"

echo ""
echo "=== What ODB files exist in step 35? ==="
ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/35-openroad-globalrouting/"*.odb 2>/dev/null | head -3

echo ""
echo "=== Try restart --from OpenROAD.DetailedRouting to skip failed antenna repair ==="
